summary: Final verification of Atlas Core 2.5D AI HUD interface after dark theme overhaul and advanced ring animation system implementation. All features working correctly. User confirmed 'Perfect' twice - this is final verification.
passed_tests: Ring 1 - All 4 AI personas (Ajani, Minerva, Hermes, Trinity) clickable and switch correctly
Ring 1 - Soft snap animation (300ms) with cubic-bezier easing working
Ring 1 - AI color themes apply correctly: Ajani (#DC143C crimson), Minerva (#20B2AA teal), Hermes (#C0C0C0 silver), Trinity (#9370DB purple)
Ring 1 - Active AI has glow effect and arc segment highlight
Ring 1 - Ring rotates to bring selected AI toward top center
Ring 2 - All 6 system nodes clickable: Settings, UI Skins, Voice Modes, Devices, Memory, Health
Ring 2 - Mechanical snap behavior (180ms) working on drag release
Ring 2 - Side panels open with correct content for each system node
Ring 2 - NO rotating scanner line (radar removed - opacity: 0)
Ring 2 - Drag-to-rotate functionality working
Ring 3 - All 7 learning nodes present: Subjects, Lab, Blueprints, Weaver, Worlds, Archives, Projects
Ring 3 - Hyper Axel NOT present (correctly removed)
Ring 3 - Graceful motion (380ms) with expansion animation (220ms) on selection
Ring 3 - Side panels open with correct content for each learning node
Ring 3 - Drag-to-rotate functionality working
Central Core - Animated canvas with glowing orb present
Central Core - Color changes correctly with active AI
Side Panel - Opens/closes correctly with dark glass styling (rgba(10, 10, 18, 0.95))
Side Panel - Displays correct AI info: domain, core belief, hard rule, projects
Side Panel - Close button works correctly
Hard Limits button - Warning overlay shows/hides correctly
Sound toggle button - Active/inactive states working
Voice/Mic button - Present and clickable (browser Web Speech API dependent)
Status display - Shows correct AI name, title, domain, and state
Dark theme - Black background (#0a0a0f), glass panels, neon cyan/magenta glows throughout
Stillness - Rings return to stillness after movement (no auto-rotation)
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality excellent - well-structured components with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
CSS uses CSS variables for consistent theming
Animation timings match spec: Ring 1 (300ms), Ring 2 (180ms), Ring 3 (380ms + 220ms expansion)
Responsive design properly implemented with media queries at 768px
context_for_next_testing_agent: Atlas Core HUD interface fully verified. All 3 rings functional with distinct motion personalities per spec. Dark tech-noir theme complete. Hyper Axel removed from Ring 3. Scanner line removed from Ring 2. All AI personas working with correct color themes. Side panels display correct content. Voice recognition depends on browser Web Speech API support. User confirmed 'Perfect' twice.

visual_verification.dark_theme: Verified - radial gradient background (#0f0f18 to #050508), glass morphism panels, neon cyan/magenta glows

ring_structure.ring1: 4 AI nodes - Ajani, Minerva, Hermes, Trinity (soft snap 300ms)
ring_structure.ring2: 6 system nodes - Settings, UI Skins, Voice Modes, Devices, Memory, Health (mechanical snap 180ms)
ring_structure.ring3: 7 learning nodes - Subjects, Lab, Blueprints, Weaver, Worlds, Archives, Projects (graceful 380ms + expansion 220ms)

side_panel.content_sections: AI header, domain, core belief, hard rule, projects
